headline: Is Tyson Foods (TSN) Quietly Redefining Its Protein Strategy With Jimmy Dean’s High-Protein Lineup?
summary: In March 2026, Tyson Foods introduced a broad Jimmy Dean high-protein frozen lineup, including bowls, sandwiches and waffles, offering up to 40 grams of protein per serving, now available at select retailers nationwide. A recent positive analyst initiation highlighting Tyson’s reinvestment in robotics, supply chain upgrades and analytics underscores how operational changes are reshaping its protein-focused portfolio. Next, we’ll examine how Tyson’s high-protein product expansion and supply...

headline: RH Set to Report Q4 Earnings: Here's What Investors Must Know
summary: RH's fourth-quarter fiscal 2025 signals solid revenue and EPS growth from expansion and pricing, but tariffs and sourcing disruptions may weigh on margins.

headline: JBS paints bleak landscape for US beef as cattle shortages persist
summary: Wesley Batista, the CEO of JBS USA, said the opening quarter of 2026 is “probably the most challenging we’ve seen in this industry in a very long time”.
